# Honeywell / IDIS / Microdigital RTSP paths.
/HighResolutionVideo	Honeywell high-res
/HighResolutionvideo	Honeywell high-res (lowercase v)
/LowResolutionVideo	Honeywell low-res
/now.mp4	Honeywell now.mp4
/dms.jpg	Honeywell dms snapshot
/dms?nowprofileid=2	Honeywell dms profile 2
/ipcam/stream.cgi?nowprofileid=2	Honeywell ipcam stream profile 2
